chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 57 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1 2. For hearing of main case 20.04.2026 Mr. Muhammad Faheem Bhayo, advocate for the applicant Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for respondent On 15.04.2026, following order was passed: “15.04.2026 Mr. Muhammad Faheem Bhayo, advocate for the applicant Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for respondent Learned counsel for respondent points out that the judgment impugned has been rendered by the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue Lahore. He states that the same is not amenable in reference jurisdiction before this High Court. Learned counsel for the applicant may seek instructions. To come up on 20.04.2026” Today learned counsel for the applicant states that the reference application may be permitted to be withdrawn to be filed before the honourable Lahore High Court. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
